response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud infrastructure, directly matching the required stack and responsibilities; his work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalable systems, and developer tooling, along with strong testing and architecture practices, makes him an exceptional fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent development and scalable backend systems
Strong DevOps and testing culture with Docker, CI/CD, and Vitest/Jest equivalents
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic, may impact local collaboration
Diverse tech history (e.g., DLang, Ember) could raise questions about focus
